items.title: Video-MME-v2: A New Benchmark for Comprehensive Video Understanding
items.summary: Researchers introduce Video-MME-v2, a significant benchmark designed to push the boundaries of comprehensive video understanding models.

items.title: Claw-Eval: Towards Trustworthy Evaluation of Autonomous Agents
items.summary: A new framework, Claw-Eval, is proposed to provide a more trustworthy and robust evaluation methodology for autonomous AI agents.

items.title: AWS Boss Explains Why Investing Billions in Both Anthropic and OpenAI is an OK Conflict
items.summary: The head of AWS clarifies the strategic rationale behind Amazon's substantial investments in both Anthropic and OpenAI, addressing potential conflicts of interest.

items.title: MegaTrain: Full Precision Training of 100B+ Parameter Large Language Models on a Single GPU
items.summary: MegaTrain presents a breakthrough in training massive language models with over 100 billion parameters in full precision on just a single GPU.

items.title: General Multimodal Protein Design Enables DNA-Encoding of Chemistry
items.summary: A new multimodal AI system demonstrates the ability to design proteins and translate chemical information into DNA sequences.

items.title: Learning to Retrieve from Agent Trajectories
items.summary: A new research paper explores methods for AI agents to learn and retrieve information effectively from their past trajectories, improving decision-making.

items.title: AIMock: One Mock Server For Your Entire AI Stack
items.summary: AIMock is introduced as a versatile mock server designed to streamline development and testing across an entire AI application stack.

items.title: AI Agent Poke Makes Setting Up Automations as Easy as Sending a Text
items.summary: Poke is a new AI agent that simplifies the creation of automations, allowing users to set up complex tasks with simple text commands.

items.title: Tubi is the First Streamer to Launch a Native App Within ChatGPT
items.summary: Tubi becomes the first streaming service to integrate directly into ChatGPT with a native application, allowing users to access content recommendations and playback within the AI interface.

items.title: Paper Circle: An Open-source Multi-agent Research Discovery and Analysis Framework
items.summary: Paper Circle is introduced as an open-source framework that leverages multiple AI agents to assist in the discovery and analysis of research papers.

items.title: ACES: Leave-One-Out AUC Consistency for Code Generation Evaluation
items.summary: A new evaluation metric, ACES, is presented to assess the consistency and reliability of code generation models by testing their tests.

items.title: GBQA: A Game Benchmark for Evaluating LLMs as Quality Assurance Engineers
items.summary: A new benchmark called GBQA uses games to evaluate the capabilities of Large Language Models in performing quality assurance engineering tasks.

items.title: ThinkTwice: Jointly Optimizing Large Language Models for Reasoning and Self-Refinement
items.summary: Researchers propose ThinkTwice, a method for optimizing LLMs to improve both their reasoning abilities and their capacity for self-correction.

items.title: Vanast: Virtual Try-On with Human Image Animation via Synthetic Triplet Supervision
items.summary: Vanast introduces a novel approach to virtual try-on technology, using synthetic triplet supervision for realistic human image animation.

items.title: Beyond Accuracy: Unveiling Inefficiency Patterns in Tool-Integrated Reasoning
items.summary: This paper investigates and reveals patterns of inefficiency in how AI models utilize external tools for reasoning, moving beyond simple accuracy metrics.
